subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! How many sighs have ascended in Thy days, and how many tears have fallen in Thy separation and estrangement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی کم من زفرات صعدت فی ایامک و کم من عبرات نزلت فی هجرک و فراقک ای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
